steps.t: Sabert, your friend at Stangard, still guards the gate. You should speak with Sabert upon your return to Stangard.
Men of Stangard can be found throughout the town. You should question many men about the death of Stanric, for Gadda suspects treachery on Sithric's p…
Sabert guards the front gate of Stangard. You should speak with Sabert at once about all that transpired during your questioning.
